behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the file path, the 5 version strings, the parameter name 'version', and all structural constraints tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (loop → independent test cases) without dictating test.each specifically or showing the patch.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_versions_parameterized requires test.each/it.each with array of {version: ...} objects and '$version' in name; alternative valid fixes like 5 separate test() calls or test.each with tuple arguments would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Node.js subprocess to parse and eval the test.each array, plus run oxlint/prettier/editorconfig CI commands.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require the loop to be removed AND test.each array to contain all 5 versions with $version in name; stubs cannot satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction requirements (5 versions, parameter named 'version', version in test name, loop removed, array removed, exit code assertion) are covered.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, Gates) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies a test file; no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers appear correct and consistent.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: File path is necessary context; no line numbers or buggy code cited.
